description: Prepare this ruggedized terminal for an aircraft 'C-Check' on the hangar floor. The browser has old shift data that must be sanitized, and needs specific settings to access legacy maintenance portals. Clear all browser history and cookies for all time and remove personal bookmarks for YouTube, Reddit, and ESPN. Organize the 12 aviation bookmarks into four folders on the bookmark bar named 'Airframe', 'Powerplant', 'Avionics', and 'Regulatory'. Configure the browser to allow pop-ups from 'https://drs.faa.gov' and 'https://techdocs.boeing.com', and permit insecure content from 'http://maint-server.local'. Set the browser homepage to 'http://maint-server.local'. Configure the browser to save downloads automatically to '/home/ga/Documents/C_Check_Manuals' without asking for a location.
